degraded.detail: The diff touches only plugins/shipwright-iterate/skills/iterate/SKILL.md (2 display lines) + one new drift-guard test file. F0 ran the full shipwright-iterate suite (438 passed, not-slow) + ruff@0.15.15 (clean) + leak-guard f0 ALLOW. No other plugin's code is touched; CI runs the full matrix.

surface_verification.justification: Display-only change: removed a stale hardcoded version string (v0.3.0) from the iterate intro banner (Markdown SKILL.md prose) + added a pytest drift-guard. No web/UI/API/server/runtime surface exists to drive. Verified by (a) the diff rendering exactly the 2 intended lines, (b) red-green proof the guard regex bites the old 'v0.3.0' banner and passes the new one, (c) the full iterate plugin suite (438 passed) which includes the SKILL.md drift + phase-matrix drift tests.

behaviors.behavior: The iterate intro banner (H1 heading + SHIPWRIGHT-ITERATE title line) carries no hardcoded version token
behaviors.evidence: test_skill_banner_no_version.py::test_h1_heading_has_no_version + ::test_intro_banner_title_has_no_version (2 passed); red-green verified the guard regex matches the removed 'v0.3.0' and not the new banner

behaviors.behavior: Removing the version does not break any SKILL.md structural drift / phase-matrix / step-rules test
behaviors.evidence: full shipwright-iterate suite 438 passed (436 pre-change + 2 new guard tests), incl. test_skill_phase_matrix / test_skill_step_6_rules_present / test_skill_e2e_gate_consistency
